_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Develop and apply corrective action procedures.
reference_document_element_description: Coordinate regulatory examination responses, including information request fulfillment, examiner access management, findings response preparation, and corrective action plan development.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI RC domain. RC-T-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-K-001 (RC, cosine: 0.538), RC-T-004 (RC, cosine: 0.469).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.7/10 (raw 0.573). Shared vocabulary: [action, corrective]. DCWF-only terms [apply, develop, procedures] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, coordinate, development, examination, examiner, findings] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.880 (P=0.905, R=0.857). P exceeds R by 0.048 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (95.0%). "Develop and apply corrective action procedures." and "Coordinate regulatory examination responses, including information request fulfi" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.589 ≈ STS 0.573 (gap 0.015). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [action, corrective] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.6%. Shared tokens: [action, corrective]. DCWF-only: [apply, develop, procedures]. WIDAI-only: [access, coordinate, development, examination, examiner, findings].
